speedrun-practice.description: A mod that helps you practice speedrunning. See website for more info

checkpoint-randomizer.description: Warp to a random checkpoint on various triggers (cells, flies, orbs, eco, death).

random-cell-order.description: Jak 1 but you must pick up cells in the (random) specified order. Check the website for more info on toggle-able settings.

flutflut-legacy.description: Play the whole game on FlutFlut.

zoomer-legacy.description: Play the whole game on the Zoomer, with various changes to better explore the entire game.

jetboard-legacy.displayName: Jak and Daxter: The JET-Board Legacy
jetboard-legacy.description: Jak 1, but you have the jetboard!

super-mario-64.description: Plays similar to Super Mario 64 (stars->cells, red coins->scout flies, coins->orbs)

bugged.description: Over 25 bugs added to completely change the speedrun! Think you can find them all? Check the website for hints

patched.description: Jak and Daxter: The Precursor Legacy v1.1 ;)

orange-demon.description: Play through the entire game while being chased by Daxter!

pogo.description: Can you beat Jak 1 while constantly jumping? This mod will test that. Check out the mod settings!

orbless.description: Orbs are invisible - can you avoid (or collect) them all? Results shown after final boss

evebase.description: The Precursor Legacy you know and love, now with more quality of life features and fun easter eggs!

j1gchaos.description: Experience Jak and Daxter like never before, with hilarious chaotic effects. A random effect picked every few seconds. Fun for speedruns.

halflife.description: An attempt at replicating Half-Life movement within GOAL.

yosemite.description: Special build that will play the cut Yosemite level! BEFORE INSTALLING: Click mod name^^ for instructions on where to paste the YOS.DGO file

spec-ops.description: Immediately after being rescued by Daxter, Jak is fitted with an all black Spec Ops outfit and a new weapon. The Blaster Mod has been replaced with a fully automatic suppressed XM Nova assault rifle that fires depleted light eco rounds. These light eco rounds will easily take down anything in your way.

mortin-time.description: Adds over 18 levels and 900+ collectibles to the game and new powerups and adventures! Note: currently it is disguised as a fart mod. It is not.

sm64-1.description: It's-a me! Mario swaps in for Jak across the whole game, bringing his full SM64 moveset, music, and voice lines with him. Powered by libsm64.

jak-the-mercenary.description: Inspired by "The Mercenaries" from Resident Evil 4, Jak has been assigned to destroy enemies for sport and aim for the highest score!

jak2-august.description: Mimics the Jak II August 2003 Review build which allows for consite skip

heromode-plus.description: Overhauls Jak II's difficulty, but with a twist! Adds weapon mods, custom modifiers, hero mode changes, and various other things to find! Are you up for the challenge?

heromode-plus-3.description: It's back, and bigger than ever! Featuring a whopping load of features such as custom missions & collectables, crazy weapon mods, random events, a leveling & skill system, a conclusive continuation of the story from Roguelike, and much MUCH more. Are you ready for the ultimate Jak 3 challenge?

roguelike-jak2.description: The Jak Time Loop is broken! To restore it, Jak must fight through random missions that grow more unstable the further you venture. As the enemies get stronger, so can you! With Vin's help, Jak must blast his way back into the metalhead nest, and restore his destiny.

dark-jak-renegade.description: Infinite Dark Jak, plus you can rolljump, use guns, vehicles, jetboard, etc. Hold L2 to use Dark Bomb/Dark Blast, or to undo Dark Giant. Reboot in debug mode to unlock everything at the start.

better-dark-jak.description: A gameplay overhaul mod for Jak 2 that modernizes the Dark Jak mechanics to work more like they do in Jak 3.

platformia.description: A giant fractal adventure made from thousands of moving platforms.

cratetopia.description: Jak and Daxter's classic puzzle spin-off game.

defend_port_wall.description: Play the cut mission 'Defend the Port Wall'. Special install instructions: https://github.com/Nick0778/OG-Jak2-Defend-The-Portwall/blob/main/README.md

accurate-unlockables.description: Speedrun mod that doesn't unlock things you skip past.

individual-mission.description: Adds Individual Mission categories to the speedrun menu, with in-game timer!

obama.description: Obama finds himself in a strange new world. Help him escape from Jak and Daxter and return to Michelle!

warp-randomizer.description: Find your way around the world of jak and daxter in new randomized layouts!

forgotten-lands.description: Experience a new story and levels. Start a new game and beat Geyser Rock to access the custom levels.

up.description: Only Up in Jak 1. WARNING: the custom levels take up ~500MB, and will take a few minutes to install.

river-to-water.description: Custom level River to Water (Afon i ddwr) of a winding mountain path with powercells, scoutflies and orbs guarded by lurkers! Visit via the warpgate once you complete the game or just use debug mode to visit early!

rockpool.description: A sunny beach side trip with cliffs to scale, powercells to find and lurkers to fight! Be careful not to swim out too far...  Access via the warpgate in debug or a full save game!

overgrown.description: 6 powercells to find in this winding ancient forest! From scaling giant trees, to navigating mazes of nettles! Rumour has it, the muses brother lives out here too...

glacier.description: The lurkers are harvesting vast quantities of dark eco from these rocky glaciers. You must stop their terrible plans and destroy their pumps! Featuring 101 orbs and 7 power cells to find and discover!

brume_village.description: Welcome to Brume Village, home of the Yellow Sage!  The village is currently out of power, and nobody is brave enough to venture into the caves to switch the power back on. Should you be up to the task, this new hub world allows you to visit three brand new interconnected levels with a total of 24 powercells to collect! Start a new save file to enter Brume!

eroded_coast.description: Welcome to the Eroded Coast! Located at the far end of Sentinel Beach, this new custom level features 6 powercells to find and 150 orbs to collect! Help restore power to the lighthouse before disaster strikes!

sandpit.description: Miners have vanished from a nearby excavation site, leaving behind their tools and Power Cells. Find the Power Cells before the lurkers do!

teamruns.description: Online and couch co-op multiplayer mod
